## Summary
What does this PR do? One sentence.

## Motivation
Why is this change needed? Link to issue if applicable: Closes #...

## Changes
- [ ] Added/modified ...
- [ ] Removed ...

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Added new tests covering this change
- [ ] Manually verified CLI still loads (`python vyralforge.py --help`)
- [ ] If touching scrapers: tested with real API call OR documented mock approach

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] New niche preset

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the existing style (ruff clean)
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated README/CONTRIBUTING if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, tokens, etc.)
